scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && CI=true npm run test --prefix frontend -- --watchAll=false
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run check:syntax --prefix backend
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
